categories.title: Romantic
phrases: Loving you means I have done the best thing, I never regret loving you, dear.
It is not easy to get the right person, but I thank God, I got you, you are the right person for me.
I love you not because of anything you have, but because of what I feel whenever I’m close to you.
Every time I close my eyes, I dream about us being happy and merry together in our dream house.
My love for you is so real, that it makes me want to do unreal things like jumping on the clouds.
I’ve always wanted to be with you, my love. Your kiss, your hug, and your wonderful smile are what I die for!
You will always be in a special place in my life and that’s in my heart.
I would climb a thousand mountains to see you smile.
When you see a falling star tonight, make a wish, it will come true because I wished and I found you.
Words aren’t enough to tell you how wonderful you are. I love you.
I wish dreams were like wishes, and wishes came true, cause in my dreams I’m always with you.
One text from you changes my whole mood.
Your love is the only armor I need to fight all of life’s battles.
My heart for you will never break. My smile for you will never fade.
When I wake up every morning, I pinch myself remembering that you’re in my life.
You’re my dream lover, and I couldn’t picture someone better suited for me than you.
When you gaze over at me, I feel a serious case of butterflies.
Your voice is my favorite sound.
Since the time I’ve met you, I cry a little less, laugh a little harder, and smile all the more.
If I could give you one thing in life, I’d give you the ability to see yourself through my eyes.
Your smile is literally the cutest thing I’ve ever seen in my life.
In a sea of people, my eyes always search for you.
Cuddling with you would be perfect right now.
Everyone has their own motivation to get up in the morning and face the day. You are mine.
Next time I hug you, I probably won’t let go for a long time.
I can’t decide if the best part of my day is waking up next to you, or going to sleep with you.
I love you more than I have ever found a way to say to you.
You have bewitched me, body and soul.
I would rather share one lifetime with you than face all the ages of this world alone.
Your hand touching mine. This is how galaxies collide.
I swear I couldn’t love you more than I do right now, and yet I know I will tomorrow.
The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
If I had a flower for every time I thought of you… I could walk through my garden forever.
I love you, not only for what you are but for what I am when I am with you.
You are, and always have been, my dream.
We love because it’s the only true adventure.
In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours.
You know you're in love when you can't fall asleep because reality is finally better than your dreams.
True love stories never have endings.
Loved you yesterday, love you still, always have, always will.
To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
Take my hand, take my whole life too. For I can’t help falling in love with you.
I love you without knowing how, or when, or from where.
For the two of us, home isn't a place. It is a person.
Love doesn't just sit there, like a stone, it has to be made, like bread; remade all the time.
You fill my heart with gladness, Take away all my sadness.
When a man loves a woman, can't keep his mind on nothing else.
I love you simply, without problems or pride.
I fell in love the way you fall asleep: slowly, and then all at once.
Love is a friendship set to music.
You can’t blame gravity for falling in love.
There is no remedy for love but to love more.
I love you more than I have ever found a way to say to you.
We can only learn to love by loving.
You are all of my today and all of my tomorrows.
Love is an irresistible desire to be irresistibly desired.
You’re my one in five billion.
When you’re a kid, you assume your parents are soulmates. My kids are gonna be right about that.
Love is a song that never ends.
Any day spent with you is my favorite day.
And in her smile I see something more beautiful than the stars.
You are the butter to my bread, and the breath to my life.
Love is sharing your popcorn.
It’s always better when we’re together.
Cause all of me loves all of you.
In case you ever foolishly forget; I’m never not thinking of you.
When you realize you - you want to spend the rest of your life with somebody, you want the rest of your life to start as soon as possible.
If I had a flower for every time I thought of you... I could walk through my garden forever.
If I know what love is, it is because of you.
I love you not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
How do I love thee? Let me count the ways.
Everywhere I’m looking now, I’m surrounded by your embrace.
Your sparkling eyes, beautiful smile, and entire being just hypnotize me with feelings I adore.
No other woman in the world can hold a candle to your beauty, charm, and grace.
You’re my best friend and my teammate. It’s a perfect combination.
Your smile is more precious than all the treasures in the world.
Each day with you is a wonderful addition to my life’s journey.
There is no better feeling than holding you in my arms.
Your voice is my favorite sound, and your smile is my favorite sight.
I appreciate you and the fact that you kill all the bugs in our house.
To find love is to find joy, peace, and happiness.
Thanks for being my biggest advocate, my confidant, and the love of my life.
We have made so many amazing memories together.
I can stare into those eyes of yours until eternity.
Every time I hug you, I never want to let go.
You’re my paradise, and I’d happily get stranded on an island with you for a lifetime.
I cherish the moments we spend together.
I love knowing we can make it through anything.
You are so sweet and loving. I admire you.
Life seems more meaningful ever since I met you.
I want to be the reason behind your smile.
Rain or sunshine, my day is special with you in it.
The quiet moments, the sweet smiles, and the silly jokes—these are the things I cherish the most.
I fell hard for you and I wouldn’t have it any other way.
You’re my soulmate, and I’ll always love you.
I have become a better version of ME because I have you in my life.
Every love story is beautiful—but ours is my favorite!
You came into my life and all the pieces fit in place.
Ever since I met you, I have known the true meaning of romance and love.
You’re my happy place.
Being in love with you makes everything better.
When I close my eyes, all I see is you, sunshine.
I believe in soulmates now, because you’re mine.
Thanks to you, I smile a little more, laugh a little harder, and cry a little less.
Thinking about you always makes me smile.
I love loving you.
My love for you is forever timeless.
With each passing day, I find myself loving you more.
You are my source of joy and the whole of my heart.
I don’t need paradise because I found you.
Because of you, life is so beautiful.
You mean the world to me.
My favorite place to be is with you.
Home is wherever I’m with you.
You make me want to become a better person.
Your beauty outshines the morning sun.
You have painted my life with bright colors.
I love that you see all of me and love me anyway.
My love for you is indescribable.
I can’t wait to spend the rest of my life with you.
I love you more than words can say.
You are my happily ever after.
Your laugh is my favorite sound.
Just so you know, I would marry you all over again.
Forget the butterflies. I feel the whole zoo when I’m with you!
You stole my heart, but I’ll let you keep it because you’re cute.
I know no one is perfect, but you’re pretty close.
You and I are the same kind of strange.
I remember who I am when I’m with you.
Love makes your soul crawl out from its hiding place.
The best and most beautiful things in this world cannot be seen or even heard, but must be felt with the heart.
A hundred hearts would be too few to carry all my love for you.
When I saw you, I fell in love, and you smiled because you knew.
The real lover is a man who can thrill you by kissing your forehead.
I’ll be loving you, always with a love that’s true.

categories.title: Love
phrases: I love to hear your voice.
You are the strongest person I know, and I admire your accomplishments so much.
I’m so amazed by you every day.
I still get butterflies like the first time I saw you.
I would love you in every lifetime.
My soul recognizes yours.
You mean everything to me.
You light up my life.
Meeting you was like seeing life in color for the first time.
You taught me what true love is.
By your side is my favorite place to be.
Through good times and bad, I will always love and support you.
Loving you is the easiest thing I've ever done.
You are my forever person.
Just thinking about you puts a smile on my face.
I want to grow old with you.
You are the most beautiful person, both inside and out.
You’re my true love and my soulmate.
Your beauty, intelligence and kindness make me fall in love with you every day.
Sometimes it feels like I’m dreaming, but then I realize it’s all real.
You make me want to be a better person.
You are my everything.
You are the sunshine in my life.
You make me feel like the most special woman on Earth.
Every single morning I thank God for you.
I love you. Whatever comes our way, we’re in this together.
I fall more in love with you every day.
You give my heart and my mind peace.
To find love is to find joy, peace and happiness.
Your heart is so full of love, and I’m lucky enough to find a place there.
Every day of ours feels just like the very first day.
No matter how dull my days go, your presence makes everything colorful.
The day I met you, God fulfilled my prayers.
You make every moment a memory that I will cherish forever.
You’re not an option. You’re my priority.
You are one in a million.
When I see myself twenty years down the line, I see you sitting next to me.
I’ve only got eyes for you.
You changed my world the day I met you.
You make me better.
We go together like peanut butter and jelly.
Every moment I spend with you is my favorite.
Being in love with you is the best feeling.
Just one message from you is enough to brighten my whole day.
Good night, my love. Wishing you the sweetest dreams.
From the moment we met, I knew you would be mine.
Knowing that you love me as much as I love you is the best feeling in the world.
There is nothing you could do that could stop me from loving you.
I want the kind of relationship where people look at us and say, I want what they have.
We are cute together.
When I met you, everything made sense.
Thinking of you and smiling.
This is what they mean when they say, “meant to be.”
Love recognizes no barriers.
My heart is and always will be yours.
In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours.
You are the music in me.
I love you and that’s the beginning and end of everything.
You are, and always have been, my dream.
The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
Thinking of you keeps me awake. Dreaming of you keeps me asleep.
Love takes off the masks we fear we cannot live without.
To be fully seen by somebody and then be loved anyhow - this is a human offering.
Love understands love; it needs no talk.
I swear I couldn’t love you more than I do right now, and yet I know I will tomorrow.
In a sea of people, my eyes will always be searching for you.
The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
Love is like the wind, you can't see it but you can feel it.
The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
Stolen kisses are always the sweetest.
Love is like the wind, you can't see it but you can feel it.
You are my sun, my moon, and all my stars.
If I know what love is, it is because of you.
My soul and your soul are forever tangled.
Love her but leave her wild.
Love is friendship on fire.
I need you like a heart needs a beat.
Love is the absence of judgment.
Love is, above all, the gift of oneself.
There is no limit to the power of loving.
Love is a friendship set to music.
There is no remedy for love but to love more.
You are all of my today and all of my tomorrows.
Love is an irresistible desire to be irresistibly desired.
Love is a song that never ends.
Any day spent with you is my favorite day.
You are the butter to my bread, and the breath to my life.
Love is sharing your popcorn.
It’s always better when we’re together.
Cause all of me loves all of you.
In case you ever foolishly forget; I’m never not thinking of you.
If I had a flower for every time I thought of you... I could walk through my garden forever.
If I know what love is, it is because of you.
I love you not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
How do I love thee? Let me count the ways.
Take my hand, take my whole life too. For I can’t help falling in love with you.
Everywhere I’m looking now, I’m surrounded by your embrace.
I choose you every day, and I’m so lucky you choose me, too.
Thanks to you, I smile a little more, laugh a little harder, and cry a little less.
There is nothing I want more than to make you the happiest woman in the world.
Your beauty, intelligence, and kindness make me fall in love with you every day!
Each day with you is a wonderful addition to my life's journey.
You are the perfect woman for me—my everything.
No other woman in the world can hold a candle to your beauty, charm, and grace.
I can't tell you what a privilege it is to fall asleep next to such a strong woman.
The more years go by, the more I learn new things to love about you.
Your care, support, encouragement, and love has transformed my life.
Being with you is the easiest choice I have ever made.
There's no one else whose smile brings me such happiness.
There is no better feeling than holding you in my arms.
I didn't think it was even possible to love someone as much as I love you.
Your voice is my favorite sound, and your smile is my favorite sight.
If life is a game, then you're the only teammate I need!
You make me feel so alive.
I’ve been waiting for a man like you all my life.
A million kisses to the most amazing man I know!
I cannot think of any better way to spend my life than with you at my side.
How lucky am I to have fallen in love with my best friend?
My favorite place in the world is next to you.
After all this time, you still give me butterflies.
I couldn’t have picked a better man to give my heart to.
I feel so safe with you.
I know fairytales are real because I have you.
Nobody is perfect, but you're so close it's scary.
Every love story is beautiful—but ours is my favorite!
You are my dream come true and I will cherish you forever.
We go together like peanut butter and jelly.
I know that everybody has their own path in life. But I'd rather share mine with you.
You are the only person I want to come home to.
Here to remind you that you're the greatest thing in my life.
Every day is the best day when I'm with you!
My happily ever after is with you.
Forget the butterflies. I feel the whole zoo when I'm with you!
Thanks for being my emergency contact!
You stole my heart, but I’ll let you keep it because you’re cute.
We have a forever type of love.
I am so in love with you that sometimes I still pinch myself.
Thank you for loving me and letting me love you.
Just when I think it’s impossible to love you more, you prove me wrong.
The day I met you, God fulfilled my prayers.
I want you to know that you are loved more than words can describe.
I can’t wait to grow old with you.
You are my safe place and I will always run towards you.
You make me the happiest person on earth.
Good morning! Here's to starting another day of being entirely distracted by thoughts of you.
I can’t remember what my life was like without you.
You are funny, kind, intelligent, and so easy to love.
I'll be thinking of you all day until I finally get to hold you again.
Thank you for reminding me I’m worthy of love, attention, and respect.
The only thing I cherish more than falling asleep with you is waking up by your side.
I've been yours since the moment I saw you—and I always will be.
No matter what comes our way in this life, we’re in it together.
When I look into your eyes, I see a future full of happiness, adventure, and endless love.
I love who you are, I love who you were, I love who you are becoming.
I never truly believed in soulmates, but then you came along and proved me wrong.
You’re the one. I’ve never been so sure of anything in my whole life.
Darling, you understand me in a way no one else ever has.
Loving you is easy. I can't wait to do it for the rest of my life.
If I know what love is, it is because of you.
We loved with a love that was more than love.
There is only one happiness in this life, to love and be loved.
You have bewitched me, body and soul.

categories.title: Happy Birthday
phrases: Count your age by friends, not years. Count your life by smiles, not tears.
As you get older, three things happen: The first is your memory goes, and I can’t remember the other two.
My life is better with every year of living it.
Old age is like everything else. To make a success of it, you’ve got to start young.
Your birthday is the beginning of your own personal new year.
The older you get the better you get, unless you are a banana.
Birthdays are nature’s way of telling us to eat more cake.
Today is the oldest you have been and the youngest you will ever be. Make the most of it!
We turn not older with years but newer every day.
You know you’re getting old when the candles cost more than the cake.
To me, old age is always 15 years older than I am.
You can live to be a hundred if you give up all the things that make you want to live to be a hundred.
There are two great days in a person’s life—the day we are born, and the day we discover why.
Wisdom doesn’t necessarily come with age. Sometimes, age just shows up all by itself.
Because time itself is like a spiral, something special happens on your birthday each year.
A birth-date is a reminder to celebrate the life as well as to update the life.
Your age isn’t you. Use today to feel your best, celebrate and be your very happiest.
A birthday is not a day to fear. It is a day to celebrate and look forward to the coming year.
The old believe everything; the middle-aged suspect everything; the young know everything.
Everything I know I learned after I was 30.
Birthdays are a great time to stop and appreciate gravity.
To keep the heart unwrinkled, to be hopeful, kindly, cheerful—that is to triumph over old age.
The way I see it, you should live every day like it’s your birthday.
Old age is like a plane flying through a storm. Once you are aboard, there is nothing you can do about it.
Please don’t retouch my wrinkles. It took me so long to earn them.
Life really does begin at forty. Up until then, you are just doing research.
If we could be twice young and twice old, we could correct all our mistakes.
Why is a birthday cake the only food you can blow on and spit on, and everybody rushes to get a piece?
The secret of staying young is to live honestly, eat slowly and lie about your age.
I still think of myself as I was 25 years ago. Then, I look in a mirror and see an old bastard.
One of the shocks of a 50th birthday is realizing the fundamental fact that your youth is irrevocably over.
How old would you be if you didn’t know how old you are?
Just remember, once you’re over the hill, you begin to pick up speed.
Life is a moderately good play with a badly written third act.
Cherish all your happy moments; they make a fine cushion for old age.
Age is a case of mind over matter. If you don’t mind, it don’t matter.
Whatever with the past has gone, the best is always yet to come.
Every age can be enchanting, provided you live within it.
There is still no cure for the common birthday.
To my surprise, my 70s are nicer than my 60s and my 60s than my 50s.
A birthday is like a new year, and my wish for you is a great year full of happiness and sunshine!
Middle age is when you still believe you’ll feel better in the morning.
You know you’re getting old when you get that one candle on the cake.
You were born an original. Don’t die a copy.
You take away all the other luxuries in life, and if you can make someone smile and laugh, you have given the most special gift: happiness.
Inside every older person is a younger person wondering what the hell happened.
When someone asks if you’d like cake or pie, why not say you want cake and pie?
Middle age is when your classmates are so gray and wrinkled and bald they don’t recognize you.
Today, you have added another candle of knowledge and wisdom to your life.
The first hundred years are the hardest.
You don’t get older, you get better.
Nice to be here? At my age, it’s nice to be anywhere.
And in the end, it’s not the years in your life that count. It’s the life in your years.
My policy on cake is pro having it and pro eating it.
Life is too short to be small.
To me, a birthday means celebrating the presence of an individual in our lives.
We are always the same age inside.
Every birthday is a gift. Every day is a gift.
We don’t stop playing because we grow old; we grow old because we stop playing.
Like many women my age, I am 28 years old.
A child whose birthday is coming up is so excited, they count down the days.
Our birthdays are feathers in the broad wings of time.
Let them eat cake.
We grow neither better nor worse as we get old, but more like ourselves.
I was brought up to respect my elders, so now I don’t have to respect anybody.
When you were born, you cried and the world rejoiced. Live your life so that when you die, the world cries and you rejoice.
Most of us can remember a time when a birthday—especially if it was one’s own—brightened the world.
Celebrate your journey of life.
A birthday is just another day where you go to work, and people give you love.
Today, you are you! That is truer than true!
Old age deprives the intelligent man only of qualities useless to wisdom.
No wise man ever wished to be younger.
May you receive many gifts, and may your day be joyous.
Few women admit their age. Few men act theirs.
Don’t regret another birthday; the good news is that you are alive and can celebrate it.
Youth has no age.
You were born, and with you, endless possibilities.
The great thing about getting older is that you don’t lose all the other ages you’ve been.
Aging seems to be the only available way to live a long life.
Today you are another year older, and we know how fast time flies.
There are three hundred and sixty-four days when you might get un-birthday presents.
Let us never know what old age is.
In other words, live vicariously, beautifully, and excitingly.
You are only young once, but you can be immature for a lifetime.
Grow old along with me! The best is yet to be.
For me, the end of childhood came when the number of candles on my birthday cake no longer reflected my age.
Let your joy be in your journey, not in some distant goal.
If I could save time in a bottle, the first thing that I’d like to do is to save every day.
Live long and prosper.
Let us respect gray hairs, especially our own.
Birthdays are inevitable, beautiful and very particular moments in our lives!
Birthdays are just nature’s way of instructing us to eat more cake.
Wishing you all things fun and delicious on your birthday!
Hope your birthday’s as special as you are.
Hope this brightens your birthday the way you brighten my life!
Like a fine wine, you get better every year.
Wishing you happiness, health, wealth, love, and all the luck this year.
Remember that you’ll only be this age for 365 days, but you’ll be awesome forever.
Wishing you another year of happiness and joy!
Aged to perfection.
You are seriously so worth celebrating.
This world is so much better because you’re in it.
Happiest of birthdays to you!
Wishing you the best of the best on your birthday and always.
Wishing you a day full of wonderful birthday surprises!
Age isn’t important…unless you’re a cheese.
Happy Birthday, best friend! I hope you enjoy your special day to the fullest.
Sending you an abundance of love this birthday, bestie.
One of the best parts of life is friendship.
Birthdays come every year, but friends like you only come around once in a lifetime.
I hope your birthday is just like you–fun, sweet, and full of love!
We’ve made so many wonderful memories together.
Today we celebrate you!
Happy Birthday to my BFF!
Just like your cake, you bring joy, light, and sweetness to the world.
I hope your laughs, love, and memories are extra special today.
You’re more than a friend to me—you’re family.
Like a fine wine, you’re only getting better with age!
Happy Birthday to my partner in crime!
Let the awkward looks and awful singing commence!
You don’t have to be young to have fun!
Welcome to middle age, when happy hour is naptime.
Happy Birthday to the most fabulous person I know.
Wishing you a day filled with laughter, love, and everything that brings you joy.
Another year older, wiser, and even more wonderful.
Your presence makes the world brighter.
You’re not getting older—you’re just becoming a classic.
Remember: birthdays are nature’s way of telling us to eat more cake.
My heart overflows with love and happiness when I’m with you.
I treasure you above all else.
May life shower you with blessings every day of your life.
You are everything I ever wished for.
You’re always on my mind.
Thank you for being you.
I wish I could express just how much I love you.
Every day I think of you and smile.
I am grateful for all the wonderful memories we’ve created together.
Happy Birthday to the single most important person in my life.
My love for you grows with every passing day.
You are my shoulder to lean on.
Happy Birthday! Thank you for all the wonderful memories.
To me, you are the embodiment of love itself.
Happy birthday to the love of my life!
I am the luckiest person in the world just for knowing you.
You are the most beautiful person I have ever met.
Happy Birthday to the love of my life!
All the words in the English language could never convey the joy I feel when I am with you.
I am thankful that you are the first person I see when I wake up every day.
I will always try to show you how much I love you every day.
Happy Birthday, my love. Today we celebrate you.
You have brought so much light into my life.
Today we celebrate you. I am grateful to you every day of my life.
Wrinkles should merely indicate where smiles have been.
Years have passed; years will pass; the difference being, today we are together.
Many times we search for the perfect words to say as well as the right reasons to stay.
Today is the oldest you have been, and the youngest you will ever be.
Every day is a gift. But some days are packaged better.
Having a birthday is like reaching a higher peak on a mountain.
May the love in your heart overshadow any sorrows.
May your birthday be as pleasant and awesome as you always are.
